case_title: KOON, JOANNA vs. HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA,A CORP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOON, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA,A CORP
